/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/toy_db.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/toy_db.dir/b_plus_tree.cpp.o CMakeFiles/toy_db.dir/page_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/toy_db.dir/table.cpp.o CMakeFiles/toy_db.dir/catalog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/toy_db.dir/log_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/toy_db.dir/lock_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/toy_db.dir/mvcc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/toy_db.dir/query_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/toy_db.dir/operators/table_scan_operator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/toy_db.dir/operators/filter_operator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/toy_db.dir/operators/project_operator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/toy_db.dir/operators/join_operator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/toy_db.dir/operators/sort_operator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/toy_db.dir/operators/aggregate_operator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/toy_db.dir/operators/limit_operator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/toy_db.dir/operators/query_executor.cpp.o -o toy_db  ../third_party/libpg_query/libduckdb_pg_query.a
